company.description: Company account that the API credential is linked to. Only present for company-level webhooks.

generateApiKey.description: Generates a new API key. When you generate a new one, the existing key remains valid for 24 hours.

generateClientKey.description: Generates a new client key, used to authenticate client-side requests. When you generate a new one, the existing key remains valid for 24 hours.

merchant.description: The merchant account that the API credential is linked to. Only present for merchant-level API credentials.
